title: Live Takeover
blurb: A live takeover — streaming right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
_help: GO-LIVE: takeover + WARNING regime. playbackId = the ACTIVE Mux live stream's PLAYBACK ID (Mux dashboard -> the live stream -> Playback IDs; NOT the Stream ID or Stream Key). warning:true drives the WARNING card + ticker crawl. To END and return to Dan Schott: deploy live.dan-schott.json as live.json. Deploy: cp live.takeover.json live.json && wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main
